mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO NF_TRADINFO_BIZCD_MGT ( REGISTTIME, UPDATETIME, CUST_NO, TRAD_NO, CODE, CODE_NAME, CODE_TYPE, GRP_CODE, GRP_CODE_NAME,
TRAD_CNT,
ORDER_NUM ) VALUES
( CURRENT TIMESTAMP, CURRENT TIMESTAMP, #{custNo}, #{tradNo}, #{item.code}, #{item.codeNm}, #{codeType}, #{grpCode}, #{grpCodeName},
#{item.cnt},
#{index}+1 )
